page: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-1xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server configured with an AMD EPYC 9575F processor based on the x86_64 architecture. It features 20 physical cores and 20 vCPUs running at 2.0 GHz with a shared CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 12.8 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA L40S GPU from the Ada Lovelace family, which provides 48 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier single-core CPU performance, with Geekbench and stress-ng single-core scores ranking in the top 10%. Multi-core performance is strong, placing in the top 25% across Geekbench and Passmark suites. Memory bandwidth is highly capable, achieving strong top 25% ratings for both cached and uncached read/write operations. In terms of specialized workloads, the server demonstrates top-tier performance in image processing, text processing, and small-model LLM inference, while medium and large LLM inference tasks register average to strong performance.

From a resource density perspective, this server offers a high-capacity memory profile and a modern enterprise GPU, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring substantial VRAM and system memory without needing local storage. However, the lack of bundled local storage requires external storage solutions, which is a key architectural tradeoff. This configuration is highly suited for machine learning inference, data science, image processing, and compute-heavy scientific simulations.
description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-1xL40S is a GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring 20 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F processor on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, translating to 12.8 GB per core, and includes a single NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB of VRAM. There is no local storage bundled with this instance. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong multi-core capabilities, alongside high memory bandwidth. The server excels in image processing, text processing, and small-model LLM inference. Given its high memory capacity and dedicated GPU, this server is well-suited for machine learning inference, data science, and compute-intensive workloads, though users must provision external storage.
og_description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-1xL40S is a GPU-accelerated server featuring an AMD EPYC 9575F CPU, 256 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB VRAM, optimized for machine learning and data science.
meta_description: UpCloud GPU-20xCPU-256GB-1xL40S is a GPU server with 20 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA L40S GPU, built for high-performance compute workloads.
tagline: A high-memory GPU instance featuring an NVIDIA L40S accelerator and AMD EPYC processing for demanding machine learning and compute workloads.

AMD EPYC 9575F processor with 20 physical cores
256.0 GB of system memory providing 12.8 GB per core
